card_01.name: The Earth Singer
card_01.story: Knows the old songs and the new soil they grow from. Sings with hands in the earth.
card_01.quote: The kind of person who can name every plant in a forest
card_01.superpower: Can find the story in the land itself
card_01.shadow: Sometimes the past weighs too heavy

card_02.name: The Desert Shaman
card_02.story: The sand whispers secrets. Hypnotic and vast. Every note expands like dunes under stars.
card_02.quote: The kind of person who sees entire worlds in a guitar riff
card_02.superpower: Can conjure landscapes with sound alone
card_02.shadow: Sometimes lost in the infinite horizon

card_03.name: The Dream Architect
card_03.story: Builds palaces in the space between sleeping and waking. Nothing is solid, everything glows.
card_03.quote: The kind of person who lives more vividly with eyes closed
card_03.superpower: Can dissolve reality with just reverb and melody
card_03.shadow: Can't quite remember which world is real
card_03.place: A room full of soft light

card_04.name: The Shadow Keeper
card_04.story: Dresses like a Victorian funeral. Finds beauty in rot and decay. Darkness is a language.
card_04.quote: The kind of person who has mapped every cemetery for miles
card_04.superpower: Can turn any room into a cathedral of gloom

card_05.name: The Cosmic Sampler
card_05.story: Builds universes from fragments. Every sample is a star. Past and future collide in the present.
card_05.quote: The kind of person who hears entire histories in a break
card_05.superpower: Can hear which album a drum sound came from by touch

card_06.name: The Stone Rider
card_06.story: Rides through endless canyons with a guitar and a story. Heavy as stone, relentless as wind.
card_06.quote: The kind of person who knows every dusty bar from here to nowhere
card_06.superpower: Can make three chords tell an entire life

card_07.name: The Vinyl Priest
card_07.story: Keeps the sacred records. Understands that the crackle is the blessing. Warmth in every groove.
card_07.quote: The kind of person who can tell you which pressing by the crackle alone
card_07.superpower: Can find the human breath in any recording
card_07.place: A record temple that never closes

card_08.name: The Voice of Witnesses
card_08.story: Every note carries a story that isn't theirs. The voice is a vessel for survival. No filters, only truth.
card_08.quote: The kind of person who believes the rasp matters more than the melody
card_08.superpower: Can hear decades of life in a single breath
card_08.place: A dimly lit bar at midnight

card_09.name: The Soulful Architect
card_09.story: Builds with jazz chords and digital spaces. Soul rooted deep, growing complex and beautiful.
card_09.quote: The kind of person who gasps when a seventh chord resolves
card_09.superpower: Can trace any melody back to the heart that made it
card_09.shadow: Overwhelmed by too much beauty at once
card_09.place: A studio bathed in golden light

card_10.name: The Timeless Drifter
card_10.story: Lives between the notes. Texture is everything. Time becomes a useless concept here.
card_10.quote: The kind of person who wakes up not knowing if it's been 20 minutes or 4 hours
card_10.superpower: Can detect the subtlest shift in tone across a 30-minute piece
card_10.shadow: Forgot what the outside world sounds like

card_11.name: The Haze Wanderer
card_11.story: Exists in the fog between real and imagined. Melodies dissolve. The world softens into texture.
card_11.quote: The kind of person who forgets they're listening mid-song
card_11.superpower: Can make distance feel intimate with just reverb
card_11.place: A room that may not be real

card_12.name: The Ancestral Groover
card_12.story: Rhythm came first. Everything else follows. Ancient drumming echoes through digital futures.
card_12.quote: The kind of person who can trace a groove back three continents
card_12.superpower: Can feel where a rhythm originated just from the pocket

card_13.name: The Noise Believer
card_13.story: Finds truth in chaos. Three chords are scripture. Noise is the only honest language left.
card_13.quote: The kind of person who calls feedback a revolution
card_13.superpower: Can hear the soul beneath the static
card_13.place: A venue that shakes the earth

card_14.name: The Void Witness
card_14.story: Sits in the void and hears infinity. Darkness is not empty—it's full of everything. Beauty in dread.
card_14.quote: The kind of person who finds a 40-minute drone meditative
card_14.superpower: Can sit in absolute stillness for hours completely transported
card_14.shadow: The darkness sometimes refuses to release
card_14.place: A space that exists but can't be seen

card_15.name: The Folk Keeper
card_15.story: Knows the songs that lasted centuries. Sings them new. Tradition alive in every note.
card_15.quote: The kind of person who actually knows what the lyrics mean
card_15.superpower: Can find stories in three-chord progressions
card_15.shadow: The weight of history sometimes crushes
card_15.place: A cabin with one window to the forest

card_16.name: The Formula Hearer
card_16.story: Appreciates the engineering. Feels through architecture. Every beat is placed with intention.
card_16.quote: The kind of person who can describe a synth's DNA
card_16.superpower: Can pinpoint exact stereo placement just by listening
card_16.shadow: The formula is all that's visible sometimes

card_17.name: The Singer-Witness
card_17.story: Writes from the bone. Every word is earned. Honesty as the only instrument that matters.
card_17.quote: The kind of person who can change your life with one perfectly-placed line
card_17.superpower: Can make you feel seen through a two-minute song
card_17.place: A stage lit only by truth

card_18.name: The Groove Historian
card_18.story: Understands rhythm as a global conversation. Every beat is a migration. Past meets present.
card_18.quote: The kind of person who can hear centuries in a single hand drum
card_18.superpower: Can feel the geographic origin of any groove

card_19.name: The Soul Balancer
card_19.story: Bridges soul and complexity. Jazz chords meet digital futures. Deep roots, expansive branches.
card_19.quote: The kind of person who sighs audibly at extended harmonies
card_19.superpower: Can trace emotional energy through the most intricate arrangements
card_19.place: A room flooded with golden sound

card_20.name: The Mirror Ball Prophet
card_20.story: The dance floor is sacred. The beat is prayer. Body and spirit dissolve together under lights.
card_20.quote: The kind of person who doesn't talk at parties—they just become the beat
card_20.superpower: Can feel the exact moment before the drop with their whole body
card_20.shadow: The high fades when the music stops
card_20.place: A room spinning under infinite lights

card_21.name: The Solitary Architect
card_21.story: Builds universes with just two speakers. The artist and listener. Nobody else exists in this space.
card_21.quote: The kind of person who forgets to remove their headphones for hours
card_21.superpower: Can disappear completely into a single track
card_21.shadow: The real world is an interruption

card_22.name: The Last Show Standing
card_22.story: Still knows every word to albums from 8 years ago. Three chords are religion. Influences are badges.
card_22.quote: The kind of person who still goes to every show even though the venue changed three times
card_22.superpower: Can identify within 10 seconds if the opening act is worth watching
card_22.shadow: Strong opinions about which album should have broken them
card_22.place: A sold-out venue where everyone knows the words

card_23.name: The Anthem Keeper
card_23.story: Carries songs like weapons. Every chorus is a statement. Music as rebellion, always.
card_23.quote: The kind of person who learns chords specifically to cover the songs that saved them
card_23.superpower: Can hear the subtext in any chorus
card_23.shadow: Sometimes protest is all that's left
card_23.place: In the front row, fist raised

card_24.name: The Composed Architect
card_24.story: Hears the geometry in music. Every odd signature is a puzzle solved. Complexity = beauty.
card_24.quote: The kind of person who gets excited by time signature changes
card_24.superpower: Can map entire song structures in real time
card_24.shadow: Sometimes loses the feeling in the formula

card_25.name: The Riff Theologian
card_25.story: Treats riffs like scripture. Repetition as meditation. Every note is a doorway inward.
card_25.quote: The kind of person who can sit through a 15-minute guitar solo without moving
card_25.superpower: Can feel the spiritual intention behind a single guitar line
card_25.place: Inside an infinite loop that's also a universe

card_26.name: The Cosmic Conjurer
card_26.story: Looks inward and finds galaxies. Sound and color merge. Reality becomes negotiable.
card_26.quote: The kind of person who hears colors when listening with eyes closed
card_26.superpower: Can dissolve the boundary between listener and sound
card_26.shadow: Hard to return to normal consciousness
card_26.place: Inside your own mind with better equipment

card_27.name: The Iron Testament
card_27.story: Devoted to the riff. Worships amplification. Louder = closer to truth. Heavy as scripture.
card_27.quote: The kind of person who considers heaviness a spiritual state
card_27.superpower: Can hear a riff and reconstruct the entire band's lineage
card_27.shadow: Sometimes the screaming is the only voice left
card_27.place: Inside the amplifier, at the birth of tone

card_28.name: The Pulse Tracker
card_28.story: The beat is a heartbeat that syncs with yours. Repetition until transcendence. Trance as truth.
card_28.quote: The kind of person who counts beats instead of sheep
card_28.superpower: Can find the exact second when repetition becomes meditation
card_28.shadow: Missing the beat means falling out of the world

card_29.name: The Soil Singer
card_29.story: Knows where the songs came from. Sings with dirt under fingernails. Land and voice are one.
card_29.quote: The kind of person who can name the story in every folk melody
card_29.superpower: Can make ancient songs feel like they were written yesterday
card_29.shadow: The past refuses to stay buried

card_30.name: The Electronic Architect
card_30.story: Builds with pure sound. Calculated beauty. Emotion encoded in waveforms and careful placement.
card_30.quote: The kind of person who can describe a synth patch like a recipe
card_30.superpower: Can hear the intention in every Hz
card_30.shadow: The formula sometimes becomes the prison
card_30.place: Inside a thinking machine made of light

card_31.name: The Soul Seeker
card_31.story: Chases the feeling of transcendence. Jazz chords open doors. Soul is the language of eternity.
card_31.quote: The kind of person who closes their eyes and finds other dimensions
card_31.superpower: Can hear the spiritual vibration underneath any chord
card_31.shadow: Sometimes gets lost in the infinite
card_31.place: A sacred space made of sound

card_32.name: The Synth Mystic
card_32.story: Finds spirituality in electronic tones. Digital spaces are cathedrals. Synthesizers are sacred.
card_32.quote: The kind of person who hears emotion in pure electronic texture
card_32.superpower: Can feel the soul inside a machine
card_32.shadow: Confused whether the emotion is theirs or the synth's

card_33.name: The Truth Wielder
card_33.story: Uses chords as weapons of truth. Angular, precise, uncompromising. Authenticity over prettiness.
card_33.quote: The kind of person who refuses to make a song sound 'bigger' than it is
card_33.superpower: Can distill entire emotions into minimal arrangements
card_33.place: A bare room with absolute clarity

card_34.name: The Darkwave Keeper
card_34.story: Lives in the space between post-punk and darkness. Finds beauty in melancholy. Gothic without cliché.
card_34.quote: The kind of person who appreciates the minor key more than any major resolution
card_34.superpower: Can find hope inside the deepest despair
card_34.shadow: Sometimes despair is the most honest feeling
card_34.place: A space that's beautiful because it's dark

card_35.name: The Hardcore Zealot
card_35.story: No compromise. No melody. Just pure conviction delivered at maximum volume. Truth through force.
card_35.quote: The kind of person who values ferocity above technical skill
card_35.superpower: Can transmit pure emotion without any filter
card_35.place: In the pit, surrounded by righteous anger

card_36.name: The Future Glitch
card_36.story: Rejects the grid. Embraces fracture. No chorus—just collision. Digital beauty in broken code.
card_36.quote: The kind of person who hears production errors as features
card_36.superpower: Can extract melody from pure noise
card_36.shadow: Sometimes exhausted by the constant now
card_36.place: A room made of screens and electric energy

card_37.name: The Dancefloor Prophet
card_37.story: The beat is a lifeline. Alone in a crowd, moving in unison. Collective body as spiritual practice.
card_37.quote: The kind of person who communicates entirely through movement
card_37.superpower: Can feel the emotional architecture of any groove
card_37.shadow: The music stopping is a small death

card_38.name: The Rhythm Archaeologist
card_38.story: Digs through samples like excavations. Every break is a fossil. History is compressed into beats.
card_38.quote: The kind of person who can name the original of any sample
card_38.superpower: Can reconstruct entire musical lineages from fragments
card_38.place: A studio built on layers of history

card_39.name: The Haze Poet
card_39.story: Writes in reversb and blur. Melodies dissolve into texture. Nothing has edges here.
card_39.quote: The kind of person who loses themselves mid-song and resurfaces somewhere else
card_39.superpower: Can make the mundane feel like a dream
card_39.shadow: Hard to distinguish dream from waking
card_39.place: A room filled with softness and mystery

card_40.name: The Spatial Drifter
card_40.story: Lives in the architecture of silence. Texture over melody. Hours evaporate unnoticed.
card_40.quote: The kind of person who wakes up and 3 hours have passed
card_40.superpower: Can detect the subtlest shift in a composition
card_40.shadow: Forgot what linear time feels like

card_41.name: The Occult Listener
card_41.story: Seeks the forbidden frequencies. Darkness as knowledge. Every note a ritual. Church = room.
card_41.quote: The kind of person who has a favorite incense and a favorite chord progression
card_41.superpower: Can transform any space into something sacred through listening
card_41.shadow: Sometimes the darkness won't let go

card_42.name: The Noise Theorist
card_42.story: Finds meaning in distortion. Noise as language. Harshness = honesty. Discomfort = truth.
card_42.quote: The kind of person who appreciates atonal textures
card_42.superpower: Can hear the soul underneath the attack
card_42.shadow: Sometimes beauty disappears into the void
card_42.place: A space that sounds like it's breaking

card_43.name: The Chords Evangelist
card_43.story: Simple chords, infinite meaning. Three strings = scripture. Believe in the power of basic honesty.
card_43.quote: The kind of person who will preach the gospel of a well-placed major chord
card_43.superpower: Can make the simplest arrangements feel epic
card_43.place: A basement venue full of believers

card_44.name: The Blues Truth Keeper
card_44.story: Carries generations of pain and survival. Every note is earned. Rasp matters more than range.
card_44.quote: The kind of person who believes sadness is the most honest emotion
card_44.superpower: Can convey lifetimes in a single vocal bend
card_44.place: A bar with no windows and strong spirits

card_45.name: The Noise Preacher
card_45.story: Rejects convention. Embraces difficulty. Music as challenge, not comfort. Demands attention.
card_45.quote: The kind of person who thinks a 12-minute song with no chorus is thrilling
card_45.superpower: Can find structure in apparent chaos
card_45.place: In the space where music breaks itself

card_46.name: The Soul Keeper
card_46.story: Carries soul in the blood. Jazz chords = prayers. Digital production = modern cathedral. Ancient + now.
card_46.quote: The kind of person who sighs audibly at a well-crafted chord change
card_46.superpower: Can find the human heartbeat in any arrangement
card_46.shadow: Too much beauty in the details
card_46.place: A studio bathed in golden historical light

card_47.name: The Complexity Lover
card_47.story: Complexity = depth. Intricate arrangements = emotional architecture. Nothing simple, everything true.
card_47.quote: The kind of person who gets excited about strange time signatures
card_47.superpower: Can track multiple melodic lines simultaneously
card_47.shadow: Sometimes gets lost in the composition

card_48.name: The Ascension Builder
card_48.story: Builds mountains from silence. Slow crescendos = spiritual journeys. Every note is a step upward.
card_48.quote: The kind of person who waits 8 minutes for the drums to enter
card_48.superpower: Can create catharsis through patient architecture
card_48.place: At the summit, where sound becomes light

card_49.name: The Groove Descendant
card_49.story: Rhythm is destiny. Body and beat become one. Groove as transcendence through movement.
card_49.quote: The kind of person who moves before thinking
card_49.superpower: Can feel the groove's lineage through generations

card_50.name: The Infinite Echo
card_50.story: Lives in reverb and space. Time becomes texture. Minutes feel like eternities of subtle change.
card_50.quote: The kind of person who doesn't notice hours passing
card_50.superpower: Can perceive infinite variation in near-silence

card_51.name: The Indie Wanderer
card_51.story: Walks between tradition and innovation. Acoustic instruments = honesty. Stories as foundation.
card_51.quote: The kind of person who knows the stories behind the stories
card_51.superpower: Can make ancient songs feel new and new songs feel eternal
card_51.shadow: Tradition sometimes feels like a cage
card_51.place: On a path between the old and new

card_52.name: The Trance Navigator
card_52.story: Surrender to the pulse. Repetition = meditation. Lost in the beat until found elsewhere.
card_52.quote: The kind of person who counts bars instead of minutes
card_52.superpower: Can navigate any emotional landscape through rhythm
card_52.shadow: Losing the beat means losing the map

card_53.name: The Void Drifter
card_53.story: Sits in the spaces between notes. Darkness = home. Texture > melody. Everything is implied.
card_53.quote: The kind of person who finds a 45-minute drone 'uplifting'
card_53.superpower: Can sit in darkness and hear universes
card_53.shadow: The void sometimes pulls you in
card_53.place: A space that might not exist

card_54.name: The Timeless Singer
card_54.story: Sings songs that never age. Knows that the old songs know everything. Voice = vessel. Land = language.
card_54.quote: The kind of person who understands that folklore is never really about the lyrics
card_54.superpower: Can channel centuries through a single phrase
card_54.place: In the lineage of singers stretching back infinitely

mock_default.name: The Sound Seeker
mock_default.story: Still finding the shape of their taste. Ears open to everything. Identity in flux.
mock_default.quote: The kind of person who'll give anything a chance
mock_default.superpower: Can appreciate something without needing to name it
mock_default.shadow: Sometimes lost between too many options
